events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need identify component/condition and visible defect cues. Scenario: Spool erection & fit-up, wrong root gap. Work rough-complete. Component condition installed-defective. Decision fail because non-compliant. Risk? Wrong root gap in piping weld fit-up can affect weld integrity; high risk in industrial piping. Need include findings: root gap not per WPS/drawing, incorrect fit-up. Actions: disassemble/rework to correct root gap, re-inspect, NDE. References: ASME B31.3, project iso drawings, WPS. Need fill all fields. percent_complete maybe 70. value 0. sound_source etc default empty string/0. order empty list. workable empty list. confidence 0.95. event_time 0.0 rate 0.0. Ensure valid JSON.

events.label: response
events.text:

    "Disassemble or adjust spool to achieve specified root gap",

  "rationale": "The root gap is a critical variable in weld joint geometry. An incorrect root gap can cause incomplete penetration, excessive reinforcement, or cracking, violating ASME B31.3 and project specifications.     "Project WPS - qualified root gap range"
  ]
